query: OpenAI, Anthropic, and Mistral AI funding rounds announced or reported in June-July 2026, and any imminent/expected funding rounds in July 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings on OpenAI, Anthropic, and Mistral AI funding for June–July 2026:

**OpenAI** — No *new* equity round in this window, but a major scheduled event occurred: SoftBank executed the **second $10B tranche** (July 1, 2026) of its $30B follow-on commitment. First tranche was April 1; third $10B tranche is scheduled Oct 1, 2026. OpenAI's last equity round was $122B at an $852B valuation (closed Feb 27, announced ~March 31, 2026). A confidential S-1 filing points to a possible Q4 2026 IPO.

**Anthropic** — No new round in June–July. Its latest is the **Series H: $65B at a $965B post-money valuation**, announced May 28, 2026, co-led by Altimeter, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia — described as potentially its last private raise before an IPO.

**Mistral AI** — The most active "imminent" situation. As of **June 12, 2026** (Bloomberg), Mistral is in **early talks to raise ~€3B (~$3.5B) at a ~€20B valuation** — roughly double its confirmed €11.7B (Series C, Sept 2025). This round was **not confirmed as closed** through early July 2026. Mistral also raised $830M in debt (March 30, 2026).

**Bottom line on imminent July rounds:** Mistral's ~€3B raise is the clearest expected-but-unclosed round; OpenAI's activity is a scheduled tranche installment (not a new round); Anthropic has nothing imminent beyond its late-May Series H.

Note: The AskNews tool hit its credit limit, so findings rely on web search, official company/investor pages (openai.com, anthropic.com, group.softbank), and major outlets (CNBC, TechCrunch, Bloomberg, SiliconANGLE).

key_facts: SoftBank executed a $10.0B second tranche investment in OpenAI on July 1, 2026, part of a $30B total follow-on commitment (first tranche $10B April 1, 2026; third tranche $10B scheduled October 1, 2026).
OpenAI's most recent equity round was $122B committed capital at $852B post-money valuation, closed Feb 27, 2026 (announced ~March 31, 2026).
OpenAI confidentially filed a draft S-1 with the SEC (reported May 22/June 8, 2026), targeting a potential Q4 2026 IPO led by Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley.
Anthropic raised $65B in Series H at a $965B post-money valuation, announced May 28, 2026 — described as potentially its last private raise before IPO.
Anthropic's Series H was co-led by Altimeter Capital, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia Capital, with Capital Group, Coatue, D1 Capital and institutional investors.
Anthropic announced no new equity funding round in June–July 2026; Series H (late May) remains the latest.

Mistral AI is in EARLY talks (reported June 12, 2026 by Bloomberg) to raise ~€3B (~$3.5B) at a ~€20B valuation (~$23.15B), roughly double its prior €11.7B valuation. Not confirmed closed as of early July 2026.
Mistral's last confirmed equity round was a €1.7B Series C at €11.7B post-money, led by ASML, announced September 2025.
Mistral raised $830M in debt financing on March 30, 2026 from seven banks for GPUs and a Paris-area data center.
The Mistral ~€3B round is the most concrete 'imminent/expected' funding event among the three companies for July 2026, though still in early discussions.
